kirundi.sr_assessed: Ivyiyumviro vy'umutoza vyiteguye hasi ya builder panel
kirundi.recall_needs_more: Banza wongeremwo nibura ivyiyumviro 4 mu migwi 2
kirundi.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: ivyiyumviro vyose vyaguye muri tray. Subiza kimwe kimwe aho gisanzwe kiri.
kirundi.sr_recall_complete: Wongeye kwubaka isi yawe yose ukoresheje ukwibuka!
kirundi.import_replaces: Ibi bizosubirira composition yawe ya ubu.
kirundi.title: Amashusho Yikukira
kirundi.tagline: Wubaka Isi y'Amashusho yawe: hitamwo archetypal structure, uyuzuze ivyiyumviro vyawe, ubishire mu 3D, kandi ubaje iciza akamaro.
kirundi.tagline2: Ng'aha ni wewe umwanditsi — AI itanga gusa uburongozi, kandi gusa iyo ubisavye.
kirundi.keep_content_hint: Imigwi n'ivyiyumviro vyawe birasigara — guhitamwo ishusho bihindura gusa ukuntu ikibanza gisa.
kirundi.print_tip: Kurako one-pager ishobora gucapwa (snapshot + ivyiyumviro vyawe + ivyiyumviro vy'umutoza)
kirundi.recall_tip: Ivyiyumviro vyawe biragwa muri tray — bisubize ukoresheje ukwibuka
kirundi.assess_tip: Saba AI coach kuraba composition yawe yose
kirundi.recall_instructions: Ivyiyumviro vyose vyavuye aho vyari biri bigwa muri tray hasi. Hitamwo iciyumviro mu kibanza, hanyuma ukoreshe group chips (canke buto [ na ]) kugira ngo ukisubize iwabo. Nta kintu kibikwa mu gihe c'umukino.
kirundi.note_placeholder: Kubera iki iki ciyumviro kiba ng'aha?
kirundi.no_3d: Ntivyashobotse gupakira 3D space ng'aha — builder panel yawe iracakora, kandi ivyo wandika vyose birabikwa.
kirundi.stage_hint: Mu kibanza: kwega iciyumviro kugira ngo ukishireho · kwega background kugira ngo uzunguruke · scroll kugira ngo ukwongereze · [ na ] bimura iciyumviro catowe hagati y'imigwi.
